title: gratiola neglecta
intro: Gratiola neglecta, also known as poor joe or blue boneset, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Gratiola neglecta include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
